programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A woman's dog was viciously attacked by a pit bull and eventually died. She's now left with medical bills and emotionally distraught. She hopes to seek justice for her pet and is suing the defendant.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing LA
programme.desc: Josh Altman and Josh Flagg have an explosive showdown at the Brits' Tower Lane property. Josh Altman celebrates the launch of his book.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: The Sharks give budding entrepreneurs the chance to secure business deals that could make them millionaires.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: The trip to Rome may be coming to an end, but the conflict continues. While a Vespa ride reminds Kyle and Dorit just how much fun they can have together.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Kyle and Dorit surprise Teddi with a baby shower, but Brandi reveals a few surprises of her own. Denise and Garcelle lament over how they think Lisa has changed.

programme.desc: After months of waiting, James and David's St Ives listing is ready to hit the market, but tensions with the seller may cause them to walk away from the listing.

programme.title: Botched
programme.desc: Dr Dubrow helps an eating disorder survivor feel beautiful in her own skin by downsizing her breasts; Dr Nassif sends a 'dinosaur' nose back to the Jurassic era.

programme.desc: A mystery we've covered for more than a decade: Was this a tragic fall, a murder or something else?
